infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Airzy needs camera access to scan QR codes for lounge check-in and ticket scanning.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Airzy needs your location to find nearby airport services and provide personalized recommendations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Airzy needs your location to track your airport journey and provide timely notifications.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Airzy uses Face ID for secure authentication.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Airzy to use your location to track airport journeys.
